dsl_rule.translation_notes: EADT pattern cannot be directly identified from available indicators; used proxies: uptrend confirmation (close > prev_close) + strong directional momentum (ADX > 25) to simulate EADT breakout context. Exit targets pullback completion within 10-11 days (hold_days_max=11) when price returns toward moving average support. Throwback rate of 67% is noted but not directly encoded as it's a probabilistic metric rather than a deterministic condition. Short entry anticipates pullback as per Bulkowski's description.

backtest_rule.reason: EADT pattern cannot be directly identified from available indicators; used proxies: uptrend confirmation (close > prev_close) + strong directional momentum (ADX > 25) to simulate EADT breakout context. Exit targets pullback completion within 10-11 days (hold_days_max=11) when price returns toward moving average support. Throwback rate of 67% is noted but not directly encoded as it's a probabilistic metric rather than a deterministic condition. Short entry anticipates pullback as per Bulkowski's description.

source_rule_text: EADT (Pullback Trading): In a bull market, EADTs exhibit high pullback rates. Enter short on breakout anticipating pullback, exit within days/week at bottom, re-enter when pullback completes.
